keyMessages: Highlight the sustainable materials and eco-friendly production process
Showcase versatility - can be dressed up or down for different occasions
Emphasize comfort and quality of fabric
Share personal style tip for incorporating piece into summer wardrobe
visualGuidelines: Bright, natural lighting. Outdoor summer settings (beach, park, rooftop). Use warm color palette with pops of product color. Mix product close-ups with full outfit shots. Keep transitions smooth and on-trend with current Reels aesthetics.

dos: Show product in real-life scenarios, not just posed shots
Include genuine personal reaction and styling process
Use trending audio that fits brand's upbeat vibe
Tag brand account and use campaign hashtags
Keep it authentic to your usual content style
donts: Don't oversell or use overly promotional language
Avoid filter-heavy editing that misrepresents product colors
Don't include competing brand logos in frame
Skip generic stock phrases - keep it personal
Don't rush the showcase - give viewers time to see details

exampleContent: Reference @fashionmaven's recent sustainable brand collab for tone and pacing
approvalProcess: Submit draft Reel for review 5 days before posting. Brand will provide feedback within 48 hours. One round of minor edits allowed. Final approval required before posting.
